## AbstractModelClass.find() method

Finds documents in the database that match the specified filter and options.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static find(filter?: QueryRootFilter, options?: QueryFindOptions): Query<any, any>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

filter


</td><td>

QueryRootFilter


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ An optional filter object to specify the search criteria.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

options


</td><td>

QueryFindOptions


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional settings for the find operation.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Query&lt;any, any&gt;

A promise that resolves with an array of documents that match the filter criteria.

## Example


```ts
const users = await UserModel.find({ age: { $gt: 18 } });
console.log(users);
```
